ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Continued To Jul-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gamble Parks appeared by zoom for Anastasia Fell.

The Court noted that there was no appearance on June 2nd, that an order to appear was issued and questions why Ms. Parks missed court. Ms. Parks apologized to the Court, and stated that she did not know there was a hearing on that date and that she was out of the Country. Ms. Parks also stated that she changed to another law firm, that she thought it was taken care of, but the Associate that was helping her was not aware and that they have a petition for final distribution on waiver of accounting ready to be filed next week. The Court discharges the order to appear. Status on close of estate is continued to July 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 on the representation that the Court will see a petition well before that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Continued To Jun-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Gamble T. Parks to appear on June 30, 2021, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why neither a Petition for Final Distribution nor Status Petition have been filed. The Status on Close of Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
